debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

proof:
constructor
  · have hpos : (0 : ℚ) < k.factorial := by norm_cast; exact k.factorial_pos
    rw [le_div_iff₀ hpos]
    norm_cast
    rw [mul_comm, ← Nat.descFactorial_eq_factorial_mul_choose]
    exact Nat.descFactorial_le_pow n k
  · apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by positivity) (by positivity)
    norm_cast
    induction k with
    | zero => simp
    | succ k ih =>
      cases k with
      | zero => simp
      | succ k =>
        simp at ih ⊢
        rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.mul_comm, pow_succ]
        exact Nat.mul_le_mul ih (by omega)

    norm_cast

    | zero => simp
    | succ k ih =>
